title: UD Dep Extract
summary: Demo notebook demonstrating the Universal Dependencies dependency structure extraction pipeline. Loads a mini subset (3 treebanks: af_afribooms, akk_riao, sq_staf; 9 sentences total) from pre-extracted UD v2.17 data. The notebook recomputes dependency distance sequences (DD_i = |position_i - head_i|) from head arrays, validates results against stored outputs, displays treebank metadata (Case proportions, spoken/written modality, sentence counts), and visualizes DD distributions per treebank and mean DD vs. sentence length. All recomputed sequences match stored values, confirming pipeline correctness.
